results.name: Return to Feed from coaching features
results.reasoning: Feed page is properly functioning with real content - shows user stories at top, active post creation area, working category filters (For You, Following, All, Basketball, Soccer, Football), and displays actual posts with user profiles, timestamps, content, and images.
